summary: Localized delivered local notification titles and bodies in the reminder application layer through ReminderNotificationCopy while preserving reminder timing, suppression, dedupe, Home schedule rules, Today projection behavior, and UserNotifications boundaries.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-notification-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: ReminderScheduler built delivered prediction and protocol notification copy inline in English, and passed Today prompt title/body strings through from prompt payloads.
contract_status_changes.after: ReminderScheduler routes delivered prediction, Today prompt, and protocol schedule notification copy through ReminderNotificationCopy in Core/Application backed by Localizable.strings.

contract_status_changes.before: Reminder timing, suppression, dedupe, deep links, protocol plan generation, and Home schedule rules were already covered by reminder/home tests.
contract_status_changes.after: Those scheduling behaviors remain unchanged; this slice only changes delivered title/body projection and keeps UserNotifications side effects inside ReminderScheduler.

contract_status_changes.before: Localization resources contained 213 static keys and 11 plural keys, with notification copy deferred.
contract_status_changes.after: All 19 locales contain 229 static keys and 11 plural keys, including prediction, Today prompt, and protocol schedule notification copy keys.

residual_risks: Non-English notification values remain English placeholders and require translation-quality review.
No running-app locale smoke, delivered-notification simulator proof, device notification proof, or TestFlight proof was captured.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning unrelated to this slice.
Notification preference UI, broader display-name adapters, and translation quality remain deferred.
recommended_next_reason: Display-name adapters are the next documented dynamic localization batch after Today, digest, protocol schedule projection, and notification copy.
